Identity.Name: StingHBNDepartments
Identity.Definition: Healthcare Building Note (HBN) clinical department taxonomy. Maps a clinical room / area to its HBN reference document; drives validator-set selection, area-schedule benchmarks, and HBN-compliance audits. The HBN reference (e.g. HBN 26 for theatres) is the source of department-specific spatial + technical standards.

Governance.StandardsBasis: NHS England Healthcare Building Notes (HBN) full catalogue; CQC department-type classifications. NOTE: NHS England periodically reorganises its HBN catalogue (renumbering / merging / retiring documents); HBN references in value definitions should be re-verified against the current catalogue before any release that publishes the enum to bSDD. Values marked "refer to current NHS England HBN catalogue" are areas where historic HBN reference numbers may have been retired or superseded.

Value.Definition: Inpatient wards (HBN 04-01 Adult in-patient facilities). Acute / general / step-down ward accommodation.
Intensive Care Unit (HBN 04-02 Critical care areas). Adult critical care.
Operating Department (HBN 26 Facilities for surgical procedures). General + day surgery theatres; recovery; anaesthetic.
Diagnostic Imaging (HBN 06 Diagnostic imaging). X-ray, CT, MRI, ultrasound, fluoroscopy.
Pathology and laboratories (refer to current NHS England HBN catalogue for active reference; historically HBN 15). Biochemistry, microbiology, histology, blood-bank.
Pharmacy (HBN 14 Pharmacy services). Dispensing, aseptic compounding, cytotoxic services.
Emergency Department / A&E (refer to current NHS England HBN catalogue; A&E was historically HBN 15 / 22). Majors, minors, resus.
Outpatients (HBN 12 Out-patient department). General / specialty outpatient clinics.
Mortuary and Post-Mortem services (HBN 20 Facilities for mortuary and post-mortem room services). Body store, post-mortem, viewing.
Endoscopy (refer to current NHS England HBN catalogue — typically covered under day-surgery / out-patient guidance). Procedure rooms + endoscope reprocessing (the latter governed by HTM 01-06).
Renal Dialysis (HBN 07-01 Satellite dialysis unit). Haemodialysis + peritoneal dialysis.
Maternity (HBN 09-02 Maternity care facilities). Antenatal, labour-delivery, postnatal.
Neonatal (HBN 09-03 Neonatal units). NICU + special care baby unit.
Children + young people services (HBN 23 Hospital accommodation for children and young people). Paediatric wards + outpatients.
Mental Health (HBN 03-01 Adult acute mental health units; HBN 03-02 Older people mental health). Acute mental health + older-people mental health.
Day Surgery / Day Care (refer to current NHS England HBN catalogue — historically HBN 52, now superseded by day-procedure guidance integrated with HBN 26).
Rehabilitation Services (refer to current NHS England HBN catalogue for active reference). Physiotherapy, OT, hydrotherapy.
Hospital Sterile Services / CSSD (HBN 13 Sterile services department). Decontamination, sterilisation, packing.
Decontamination — chemical / radiation / biological decon facility. Specific guidance via HTM 01-01 (medical devices) + HTM 04-01 (water) for cleaning regimes.
Oncology (HBN 02-01 Cancer treatment facilities). Chemotherapy + radiotherapy delivery suites.
Cardiology + cath lab (refer to current NHS England HBN catalogue for active reference). Catheterisation, EP, echo.
Administrative + support — back-of-house clinical support areas without direct clinical activity. Excluded from most validators.
